ModMetaData.name: Lycan Color Fix (Pawn Editor Compatible)
ModMetaData.author: SegasWolf
ModMetaData.description:
Fixes Lycan color channels so body fur and tail follow skin color instead of hair color.
[h2]What this changes:[/h2] - Chest fur: now follows [b]Skin[/b] color (was Hair) - Wolf tail: now follows [b]Skin[/b] color (was Hair) - Canine ears and nose: unchanged (already Skin)
[h2]Result:[/h2] - Set skin color → face, body fur, tail, ears, nose all match - Set hair color → only hair changes - Compatible with Pawn Editor for full color customization
[h2]Requires:[/h2] - Biotech DLC - Vanilla Races Expanded - Lycanthrope
